name: Code Monitor Red Teaming for Public-Test-Passing Code
summary: arXiv:2607.20852v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Visible tests are a common gate for LLM-generated code, but passing them does not certify specification correctness. We study a deployment-like monit...
description: arXiv:2607.20852v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Visible tests are a common gate for LLM-generated code, but passing them does not certify specification correctness. We study a deployment-like monitoring problem: after code has passed public tests, can a weaker LLM verifier identify the residual hidden bugs? We introduce Code Monitor Red Teaming, a monitor-red-teaming protocol that fixes a publi...
author: Junchi Liao, Jiawen Deng, Fuji Ren
